feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A15/18 and L104B03/08/09 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 18, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 19, 04:00 UTC

May 28, 13:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09.

Start time : 18/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 19/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09 to L104B02/B06.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A04/05/07/08/10 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 17, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 18, 04:00 UTC

May 28, 13:14 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A04/05/07/08/10.

Start time : 17/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A04/05/07/08/10 to L104B05.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Room W17 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 17, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 12, 20:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 17/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified racks listed below may experience temporary IPMI unavailability during the operation, for a period of five minutes per rack.
W17A01, W17A02, W17A03, W17B01, W17B02, W17B03, W17A04, W17A05, W17A06, W17B04, W17B05, W17B06, W17A07, W17A08, W17A09, W17B07, W17B08, W17B09, W17A10, W17A11, W17A12, W17B10, W17B11, W17B12, W17A13, W17A14, W17A15, W17B13, W17B14, W17B15, W17A16, W17A17, W17A18, W17B16, W17B17, W17B18 , W17A19, W17A20, W17A21, W17B19, W17B20 and W17B21.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L104B06 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 16, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 17, 04:00 UTC

May 28, 13:12 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the rack L104B06.

Start time : 16/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified rack from L104B06 to L104A01 L104A02 L104A03.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L104B05 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 15, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 16, 04:00 UTC

May 28, 13:10 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the rack L104B05.

Start time : 15/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified rack from L104B05 to L104B01 L104B02 L104B03 L104B04.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [US][Virtual Private Servers] - Instances operating system maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 10, 14:00 - 16:00 UTC

May 28, 12:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Virtual Private Servers offer for the US.

Start time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : The operating systems Ubuntu 25.04 and Fedora 42 are end-of-life.
Customers who have already installed one of these operating systems may continue to use it, but will no longer be able to reinstall it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, starting from June 1st, customers will no longer be able to install end-of-life operating systems.
We encourage customers using these operating systems to migrate to supported versions such as Ubuntu 26.04 or Fedora 44, or a later version.

You can find the information at the following links:
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1144
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1158

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack W13A12 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 8, 10:00 - 11:30 UTC

May 21, 22:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 08/06/2026 10:00 UTC
End time : 08/06/2026 11:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SYD2][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 3, 21:00 UTC  -  Jun 4, 07:00 UTC

May 13, 20:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 03/06/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 04/06/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Public network and IPMI will be unavailable during maintenance for servers located in the specified racks:  S2-5X-02-06A, S2-5X-02-07A, S2-5X-02-07B, S2-5X-02-08A, S2-5X-02-09A, S2-5X-02-10B, S2-5X-02-11A and S2-5X-02-11B.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage incident notification
entry.content:
May 28, 21:04 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Storage and Backups offering has been resolved.

Start time : 28/05/2026 13:56 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 20:42 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 18:55 UTC
Identified - Please find the details of this incident below :
Update : The network equipment is still unstable, so we are proceeding with its replacement.
Customers Impact : The public network will be temporarily unavailable during the replacement process.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 16:35 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 28/05/2026 16:03 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :
Start time : 28/05/2026 14:22 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 15:43 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Backup Storage offering.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 28/05/2026 13:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some backup storage server is temporarily unavailable in the specified region.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX6][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46J28 incident notification
entry.content:
May 28, 20:55 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 28/05/2026 14:22 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 20:44 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 18:54 UTC
Identified - Please find the details of this incident below :
Update : The network equipment is still unstable, so we are proceeding with its replacement.
Customers Impact : The public network will be temporarily unavailable during the replacement process.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 16:34 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 28/05/2026 16:03 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :
Start time : 28/05/2026 14:22 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 15:34 UTC
Update - Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : We are currently replacing the fan module in the network equipment.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 15:34 UTC
Identified - Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 28/05/2026 14:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack 46J28 are no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 14:56 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 28/05/2026 14:48 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/05/2026 14:22 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack 46J28 were no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW][Dedicated Servers] - Room WAW0106/WAW0107 maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 28, 16:16 UTC
Completed - The maintenance has been postponed and will be re-scheduled.

May 18, 15:05 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack WAW0106A02C
- Rack WAW0106A05C
- Rack WAW0106B02C
- Rack WAW0107A05C

Start time : 02/06/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 02/06/2026 20:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Network] - Network equipment maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 28, 15:57 UTC
Completed - The maintenance have been completed since 15:30 UTC

May 28, 12:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 13, 20:02 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 15:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

List of concerned Racks :
- Rack WAW0118A01B
- Rack WAW0118A01C
- Rack WAW0118A04A
- Rack WAW0118B04B
- Rack WAW0118A04B
- Rack WAW0118A04C

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX6][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 46J28 Incident Notification
entry.content:
May 28, 14:12 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer in the rack 46J28 which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/05/2026 13:56 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 14:02 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack 46J28 were no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [GRA6][Virtual Private Servers] - Some instances incident notification
entry.content:
May 28, 18:59 UTC
Update - Please find an update of this incident below:

Ongoing Actions : Our teams are continuing to work on resolving this issue.

We will keep you updated on the progress and final resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 15:10 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : Some instances are impacted by this incident. Our teams are currently performing checks and replacing components where necessary.

We will keep you updated on the progress and final resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 12:31 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Some Virtual Private Servers instances in the GRA6 regions remain temporarily unavailable.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 28, 10:19 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Virtual Private Servers offer on the specific GRA6 region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/05/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers instances in the GRA6 region are unreachable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their Virtual Private Servers instances in GRA6 region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B09 maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 28, 08:40 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 28, 07:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 30, 22:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack S333B07 maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 28, 03:04 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 28, 02:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 20:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack S333B07.

Start time : 28/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public and vRack networks will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in S333B07 which doesn't have LACP activated.
However, if LACP is activated, bandwidth perturbation will be observed on Public and vRack networks for servers in S333B07.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage incident notification
entry.content:
May 27, 19:00 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Backup Storage offering has been resolved.

Start time : 27/05/2026 06:50 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 27, 12:01 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Backup Storage offering.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 27/05/2026 06:50 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : One backup storage server is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
